nf/quick-397-rebase.task_description: Add smart argument parsing to /nf:coderlm so it auto-detects callers/implementation/tests/peek from input shape — no subcommand required
nf/quick-397-rebase.approach: Implement heuristic-based argument detection in /nf:coderlm to infer query operation (callers, implementation, tests, peek) from input shape and argument count, eliminating the need for explicit subcommands.
out_of_scope: Modifying coderlm-lifecycle.cjs or binary download/spawn behavior
Changing coderlm-adapter.cjs methods or adding new query endpoints
Building interactive prompts to disambiguate user intent when input is ambiguous
Implementing fuzzy matching or spell-checking for symbol/file names
Caching or persisting query results across invocations
nf/quick-397-rebase.risk_reason: Single file change in commands/ — guardrail requires minimum medium for command/workflow files.
